examples:
<sqf>
scopeName "main";
while { true } do {
	scopeName "loop1";
	while {true} do {
		scopeName "loop2";
		if (condition1) then {breakTo "main"}; // Breaks all scopes and return to "main"
		if (condition2) then {breakOut "loop2"}; // Breaks scope named "loop2"
		sleep 1;
	};
	sleep 1;
};
</sqf>

<sqf>
call {
	scopeName "main";
	call {
		123 breakOut "main"
	};
	345
}; // call returns 123
</sqf>

<sqf>
call {
	scopeName "Main"; // Parent Main
	call {
		scopeName "Main"; // Child Main
		"String" breakOut "Main"; // Will break out of child main and return "String" to parent main
	};
};
</sqf>
name: breakOut

Item.desc: name of the scope which was previously set with [[scopeName]]. <sqf inline>""</sqf> will exit the current scope (see also [[exitWith]])
Item.name: name

Item.desc: name of the scope which was previously set with [[scopeName]]. <sqf inline>""</sqf> will exit the current scope (see also [[exitWith]])
Item.name: name
